action_ref.content:
```bash
# Extract a sample of pixel values from the original image
for i in 100 1000 5000 10000 50000 100000 200000 300000 400000; do
    echo "Line $i: $(sed -n "${i}p" image.ppm)"
done
```

```bash
# Check exact byte counts
wc -c image.ppm
```

```bash
# Look at a range of lines to understand the format better
sed -n '1,50p' image.ppm | cat -A
```

```bash
gcc -static -o /app/reversed /app/mystery.c -lm && (/app/reversed 2>/dev/null) > test_final.ppm && ls -la test_final.ppm && echo "Original size:" && ls -la 
image.ppm
```
